title: 25th anniversary albums
wikitext:
[]: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 26, 2019 11:18 pm March: Evangelion 25th Anniversary soundtrack A rerelease of the OSTs for the show, Death and End of Eva in one box. 5CDs, new Masayuki illustration April: Evangelion Infinity Collection of (almost?) all the different versions of Decisive Battle, including the ones heard in the opening scene of Shin Eva (Avant 1) 2CDs May: Evangelion Finally Collection of previous Eva songs by Yoko Takahashi and Megumi Hayashibara, 1CD. https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Dec 27, 2019 5:15 am Hopefully they find their way on Amazon cause I want all 3 releases. What a nice year 2020 is going to be.

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Dec 27, 2019 9:44 am Where is the Eva VOX sequel album?

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Dec 27, 2019 10:04 am Joseki wrote: Hopefully they find their way on Amazon cause I want all 3 releases. What a nice year 2020 is going to be.

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 27, 2019 5:31 pm VOX is the R&B/rap album. "After the End" is from Addition .

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Dec 29, 2019 3:15 pm Wow, there's even more Eva albums than the ones I was aware of. There's really a ton. I also think we might get another "Outtakes" album, since the first one was called something like volume 1. The one that came out the same day as the Shin Godzilla soundtrack.

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Dec 29, 2019 10:41 pm Cool! I'm not really interested in buying CDs though... Vinyl on the other hand... with a big, beautiful new illustration by Masayuki on the other hand... I wouldn't hesitate at all!

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Mon Dec 30, 2019 2:16 am lol vinyl, I can smell the Pabst Blue Ribbon from here.

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Dec 30, 2019 8:25 am ^ what does this mean? Google told me it's a beer? Does it smell like vinyl, or smth? (I'm not American, I don't know what you guys associate your brands with) I really like Vinyl for the huge artwork to decorate my wall with, mostly... That was also the reason I bought Evangelion on Laser Disc

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Mon Dec 30, 2019 5:49 pm hehehe PBR is the stereotypical beer of hipsters

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Dec 31, 2019 11:54 am I guess you're trying to say that it is a beer "for" hipsters, and I'm a hipster for liking Vinyl? Very original joke, lol.

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 18, 2020 6:51 pm The funniest part of that joke was watching the cultural dissonance land with a solid thud. On the Anniversary CD, I wonder if that’s just a rerelease of the S2 Works. I already have that, so I’m less inclined to buy it again just for new album art.

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Jan 18, 2020 8:20 pm I'll think of updating the topic when we get more info. I won't be buying these albums for now (money..) but I think it's great that we get more of these from an "archive" angle as well.

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Wed Jun 24, 2020 4:48 am After a delay, the Evangelion Finally album and the 25th anniversary soundtrack box both will release October 7th. https://www.eva-info.jp/9473 Masayuki drew the cover for the box. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Jun 24, 2020 10:54 am Oooo this sounds like it's gonna be good. Also hot damn that artwork

[]: Re: 25th anniversary albums             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 24, 2020 1:54 pm What I'm confused about with the 25th Anniversary Album, is Claire's Fly Me to the Moon isn't on there, unless that's the 2020 cut? ( https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/sd25thbox-finally/ ) Is that just another rights issue with that version (and here I thought it was some U.S. rights issue ), or what exactly? I'm considering picking it up, though. Looks like good stuff!
